backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the vehicle service booking backend with types for vehicle, capacity, service, and cleaning options; exposes CRUD functions to create, retrieve, update status, assign mechanics, and fetch individual bookings.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the discreet admin navigation entry point feature to its implementation file (Layout.tsx) with associated test IDs and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, pages, hooks, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Cleanio React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, wraps the tree in AdminAuthProvider, and guards /admin and /admin/bookings routes with ProtectedAdminRoute.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginForm.t: Admin password login form with show/hide toggle, inline error feedback, loading spinner, and submission handled via the useAdminAuth hook's login function.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Shared booking form component supporting all service types with fields for customer info, vehicle type, capacity, and time slot; builds the correct CleaningSubOption variant and navigates to the confirmation page on successful submission.
frontend/src/components/ChatBot.tsx: React component rendering a chatbot UI with message bubbles, a typing indicator, quick-reply buttons, and a free-text input field for the repair conversation flow.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header with responsive navigation links, a main content area, and a footer with the Cleanio branding.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedAdminRo: Route guard component that renders the AdminLoginForm if the user is not authenticated, otherwise renders the protected child content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.tsx: Context provider and hook implementing simple password-based admin authentication with persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to manage Internet Identity login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on bookings (fetch all, fetch one, create, update status, assign mechanic) via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRepairConversation: State machine hook managing a multi-step repair diagnosis chatbot conversation, tracking messages, current step, and collected issue details.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts and Tailwind directives, defines the Cleanio brand design tokens (deep charcoal + electric orange) as CSS custom properties, and declares reusable component and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminBookingsPage.tsx: Admin page that lists all bookings with status update and mechanic assignment controls, using query hooks to fetch and mutate booking data and rendering each booking as a styled card.
frontend/src/pages/BookingConfirmationPa: Confirmation page shown after a successful booking, displaying booking details (ID, customer, service, time slot, status, mechanic) fetched via a query hook using URL search params.
frontend/src/pages/CleaningPage.tsx: Service page for the cleaning option that lets users choose between Colour Foam Washing (₹199) and Normal Foam Washing (₹149), then renders the BookingForm with the selected sub-option.
frontend/src/pages/FullServicePage.tsx: Service page for the full two-wheeler service, displaying a checklist of included items and rendering the BookingForm pre-configured for the fullService service type with capacity selector and pricing.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section, three service cards (Full Service, Repair, Cleaning) with navigation links, and a features grid highlighting doorstep service, same-day slots, certified technicians, and AI diagnostics.
frontend/src/pages/RepairPage.tsx: React page for the repair service that combines a chatbot-driven diagnosis flow with a booking form, showing the form only after the conversation is complete.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (brand-orange, charcoal, semantic UI colors), extended border radii, box shadows, and enabling dark mode, typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Cleanio' tracking version, known issues (admin login page inaccessible from production), and an existing feature request to add a discreet admin navigation link in the footer or header.
